chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP. No. D- 667 of 2023 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) Direction 1. For orders on Misc. No. 3535/2023 2. For orders on Misc. No. 3013/2023 3. For hearing of case 06.02.2023 Petitioner Arbab Ali present in person --------------- 1. Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Through this petition, the petitioner has assailed vires of the notification dated 29th September 2020, whereby respondent No.3/Noor Ahmed Chachar, Deputy Administrator Zakat (BS-18) has been promoted to the post of Administrator Zakat Sindh (BS-19), Auqaf, Religious Affairs, Zakat & Ushr Department, on an acting charge basis, inter alia, on the ground that the respondent No.3 being a non-cadre officer is not qualified to hold the post of Administrator Zakat Sindh (BS-19). Per the petitioner, the appointment on acting charge basis of respondent No.3 for a longer period is contrary to law as that post requires to be filled in by a qualified person of cadre officer of PAS/Ex-PCS or PSS, therefore, the posting of respondent No.3 as Administrator Zakat Sindh is in sheer violation of the rules. To appreciate whether the post of respondent No.3 is qualified to hold the post of Administrator Zakat, let notice be issued to the respondents as well as learned AAG with directions to file comments on or before the next date of hearing. To come up after two weeks. JUDGE JUDGE Nadir*
